title: Commercial Optimisation Lead / Incentives Analyst
required_skills: 2+ years experience in a commercial role within gaming industry
Bachelor's degree (Marketing or Data Science advantage)
ROI monitoring and promotional performance analysis
Promotional spend and cost exposure management
Collaboration with Data Analytics and Finance teams
bonus_skills: Marketing KPI translation to financial performance
Offer design and pricing strategy support
matched_skills: ROI analysis and performance reporting (IPC, GRG Banking roles)
Commercial analytics and spend monitoring (HSBC USD 8M programme)
Regular performance reports and actionable insights to stakeholders
Customer segmentation and cohort analysis skills
missing_skills: Gaming industry experience — hard requirement, not in CV
Abuse risk and bonus leakage identification
core_responsibilities: Analyse performance of incentives, rewards, and promotional campaigns
Monitor ROI, promotional spend, and cost exposure
Identify abuse risks, bonus leakage, and inefficiencies
Support offer design through commercial modelling and performance analysis
Produce regular performance reports and actionable insights
recommended_emphasis: Lead with commercial analytics and ROI measurement (HSBC programme budget variance)
Frame HSBC spend tracking as promotional spend and cost monitoring analogue
Highlight cross-functional collaboration with Finance team
Gaming industry experience is a hard requirement — not in CV
Be transparent about gaming/incentive industry gap

company_info.size_raw: TalentBet: 2-10 employees (recruitment agency); client company size unknown
